customers.name: Earl Whitener
customers.notes: Lid 15 ft from back porch under flower bed. Widower, prefers calls after 9am.

customers.name: Doris McGinnis
customers.notes: Long gravel drive, tank on left past the barn. Pays by check on the spot.

customers.name: Randy Huffstetler
customers.notes: Dog in yard — call ahead. Lid has riser, easy access.

customers.name: Brenda Costner
customers.notes: Gate code 4417. Tank between the two maples in side yard.

customers.name: Wayne Rhyne
customers.notes: Big household, 6 people. Recommended 24-month cycle but he declined. Tank ~15 ft off the back deck, in line with the big oak.

customers.name: Peggy Stroupe
customers.address: 1029 Old NC 27 Hwy, Mount Holly, NC 28120
customers.notes: Daughter Karen handles scheduling: (704) 813-2244. Lid under stepping stones.

customers.name: El Maguey Mexican Grill
customers.notes: 1,000-gal grease interceptor out back plus the septic tank — pump both. Get in before the 11am open; ask for Hector to unlock the side gate. Leave the signed trip ticket/manifest with him for the county FOG file.

customers.name: Tommy Carpenter
customers.notes: Lid 3 ft off back deck corner. Watch for low septic vent pipe when backing in.

customers.name: Linda Setzer
customers.notes: Two dogs, friendly but loud. Tank in front yard left of walkway.

customers.name: Harold Friday
customers.notes: Retired, always home. Lid buried about 8 in, bring probe rod.

customers.name: Janice Hovis
customers.notes: Park on road, drive washes out when wet. Tank 40 ft behind house.

customers.name: Gerald Ledbetter
customers.address: 1816 Bess Town Rd, Bessemer City, NC 28016
customers.notes: Goats in side pasture, keep gate latched. Pays cash. Lid under the flower bed, 3 ft left of the spigot.

customers.name: Carolyn Quinn
customers.notes: New owner since 2024, previous records under 'Tucker'. Lid by AC unit.

customers.name: Roy Cloninger
customers.notes: Just over the High Shoals line. Steep backyard, use the long hose.

customers.name: Frances Dellinger
customers.address: 510 Puetts Chapel Rd, Bessemer City, NC 28016
customers.notes: Hard of hearing, knock loud. Lid under birdbath — move it gently.

customers.name: Catfish Cove Seafood
customers.notes: 750-gal interceptor fills fast on fry days. Pump Mondays only — closed that day, manager opens up at 9. Leave the manifest in the kitchen folder by the back door for the health inspector.

customers.name: Kenneth Pasour
customers.notes: Works nights, do not ring bell before noon. Tank flags marked in orange.

customers.name: Mama Jo's Country Kitchen
customers.notes: 500-gal interceptor behind the kitchen door, tight alley — send the small truck. Service before the 11am open. Hand the trip ticket to whoever's prepping; they keep it for the inspector.

customers.name: Betty Lineberger
customers.notes: Granddaughter's swing set sits near lid, may need to shift it.

customers.name: Marvin Sellers
customers.notes: Baffle replaced 2023. Check outlet tee while there.

customers.name: Shirley Plonk
customers.notes: Far west end of county. Combine trip with Twin Oaks BBQ if possible.

customers.name: Twin Oaks BBQ
customers.notes: 1,000-gal interceptor under the smoker shed. Get in before lunch prep starts around 10. Owner Dale wants the manifest and invoice emailed, not mailed.

customers.name: Glenn Rudisill
customers.address: 905 Costner School Rd, Bessemer City, NC 28016
customers.notes: Electric fence around garden, breaker box in carport to shut it off.

customers.name: Margaret Withers
customers.notes: Lid under mulch bed by mailbox post. She likes a courtesy call day before.

customers.name: Ralph Heavner
customers.address: 4937 Tryon Courthouse Rd, Bessemer City, NC 28016
customers.notes: Rooster gets aggressive, stays penned if you call ahead.

customers.name: Riverside Diner
customers.address: 421 W Catawba Ave, Mount Holly, NC 28120
customers.notes: 750-gal interceptor in the rear lot, shared access with the barber shop — don't block it. Come before the 7am breakfast rush. Leave the signed trip ticket with the cook.

customers.name: Joyce Beam
customers.notes: Tank pumped through small lid last time — dig out main lid next visit.

customers.name: Donald Kiser
customers.notes: HOA neighborhood, park truck on his drive not the street.

customers.name: Ann Featherstone
customers.notes: Gate code 8230. Horses in back field, close gates behind you.

customers.name: Stowe Park Grill
customers.notes: 1,000-gal grease interceptor only — building sewer is on city. Service before 10am, lunch rush after. Drop the signed manifest at the host stand for their FOG binder.

customers.name: Larry Throneburg
customers.notes: Lid 20 ft straight out from kitchen window. Leave invoice in screen door.

customers.name: Patricia Eaker
customers.notes: Schedule around dialysis Tues/Thurs. Son mows over lid, flag it after.

customers.name: Steve Boheler
customers.notes: Pool installed 2024 — tank access now through neighbor's side, they're fine with it.

customers.name: Ruth Carrigan
customers.notes: Sweet lady, bakes for the crew. Lid under concrete stepping square.

customers.name: Bobby Falls
customers.notes: Dog in yard — call ahead. Big shepherd named Duke, fine once he meets you.

customers.name: Helen Quickel
customers.notes: Filter on outlet, rinse it each visit. Spigot at back left corner.

customers.name: James Ratchford
customers.address: 3318 S New Hope Rd, Gastonia, NC 28056
customers.notes: Travel nurse, text don't call: same number. Lockbox on gate, code 1957.

customers.name: Dorothy Spargo
customers.notes: Steep drive, back in from the top. Tank near river side of house.

customers.name: Charles Abernethy
customers.notes: Lid risers installed 2024, no digging needed now.

customers.name: Gloria Hand
customers.notes: Renters on property — bill goes to Gloria at PO Box 218, Lowell.

customers.name: Walter Eudy
customers.notes: Near Crowders Mountain trailhead, weekend traffic heavy. Go weekday.

customers.name: Evelyn Moss
customers.notes: Gate code 4417 (same as her sister Brenda on Beaty Rd). Cats everywhere.

customers.name: Frank Summey
customers.notes: Lid under deck hatch — bring the stubby wrench for the hatch bolts.

customers.name: Mildred Boyce
customers.notes: Nephew Mark meets us there, works for the county. Tank by well house.

customers.name: Eugene Tallent
customers.notes: Garbage disposal household — push 24-month cycle next visit.

customers.name: Hazel Whisnant
customers.notes: Leave gate as found (sometimes open, sometimes closed — ask Hazel).

customers.name: Albert Pressley
customers.notes: Truck won't fit past basketball goal, bring extra hose length.

customers.name: Marie Huss
customers.notes: Lid 10 ft from clothesline pole toward fence. Likes reminder postcards.

customers.name: Clyde Mauney
customers.notes: Pond on property, pump truck stays on gravel — ground soft near dam.

customers.name: Irene Lutz
customers.address: 308 School House Rd, High Shoals, NC 28077
customers.notes: Tiny town, easy find. Key under flowerpot if gate locked (she said so).

customers.name: Vernon Hoyle
customers.notes: Drain field repaired 2022 by us — check for standing water while there.

customers.name: Lois Cannon
customers.notes: Snowbird — in Florida Nov through March, schedule summer only.

customers.name: Herman Sifford
customers.notes: Northeast corner of county. Lid by propane tank, 2 ft down.

customers.name: Thelma Dixon
customers.notes: Dog in yard — call ahead. Also a goose. The goose is worse.

customers.name: Raymond Jenkins
customers.notes: Lid under hosta bed by back steps. Wife handles payment, Venmo ok.

customers.name: Annie Propst
customers.address: 1812 St Marks Church Rd, Cherryville, NC 28021
customers.notes: Driveway shared with church — don't block Sunday mornings.

customers.name: Carl Stowe
customers.notes: River house, big gatherings. Lid in island bed mid-yard, marked with whirligig.

customers.name: Edith Crocker
customers.notes: Mailbox says Crocker/Bell. Use the second drive past the cattle gap.

customers.name: Howard Neagle
customers.notes: Lid 15 ft from back porch under flower bed — second tank for shop is separate bill.

customers.name: Bernice Lail
customers.notes: Neighbor of Doris McGinnis, schedule same trip. Pays by check.

customers.name: Russell Auten
customers.address: 1922 Hickory Grove Rd, Mount Holly, NC 28120
customers.notes: Gate code 0312. New gravel pad by tank, easy access now.

customers.name: Pauline Black
customers.address: 318 Crowders Creek Church Rd, Gastonia, NC 28052
customers.notes: Bring change for $200 cash, she rounds up and tips the crew.

customers.name: Oscar Wehunt
customers.notes: Tank under old gravel drive, lid has traffic-rated cover.

customers.name: Ethel Rankin
customers.notes: No relation to the lake, she'll tell you anyway. Lid by grape arbor.

customers.name: Willie Springs
customers.notes: Mountain drive, low gear coming down loaded. Call from bottom gate.

customers.name: Geneva Hoffman
customers.notes: Road named for the family. Tank behind smokehouse, watch the clothesline.

customers.name: Leon Brackett
customers.notes: Dog in yard — call ahead. Beagle, mostly harmless, will follow the hose.

customers.name: Vera Chastain
customers.notes: Lid under flagstone by hose reel. Granddaughter set up email billing.

customers.name: Marshall Teague
customers.notes: Busy road, cone off the shoulder. Tank in front yard near ditch.

customers.name: Opal Whitesides
customers.notes: Creek crossing on drive floods after big rain — check weather first.
